name: Memory Time Travel Pack
description: 将记忆快照、时间点回溯、漂移 diff、回滚计划、approved rollback write-back plan、pack-local rollback writeback store/executor handoff plan、retention dry-run/prune plan、pack-local retention prune executor、native kv_history plan/migration preview/dual-read parity/cutover readiness/cutover plan、KV audit link schema/preview gate/writeback plan/store handoff/executor handoff plan 和证据包导出作为可选记忆治理能力包暴露。

routeSpecs.description: Read Memory Time Travel pack shell status, readiness flags and retention policy.
List stored memory snapshot summaries, optionally filtered by namespace.
Save or dry-run validate one memory namespace snapshot.
Read one saved memory snapshot by id.
Reconstruct the latest snapshot at or before a requested timestamp.
Diff two memory snapshots and return drift risk plus rollback plan actions.
Build a dry-run rollback plan for a selected memory snapshot.
Build a non-destructive approved rollback execution and Ledger KV write-back plan without mutating memory or Ledger state.

Persist an approved rollback write-back handoff record into the pack-local review store without writing Ledger/Temporal KV, mutating live memory, appending Merkle proofs or enqueueing the global Approval Manager.

Build a non-destructive rollback executor handoff plan from the pack-local rollback write-back store without consuming approvals, writing Ledger/Temporal KV, mutating live memory or appending Merkle proofs.
Build a dry-run retention plan for pack-local memory snapshots without deleting data.
Build a non-destructive approval plan for selected retention prune candidates without deleting data.
Execute an approved pack-local retention prune by deleting only selected snapshot directories while keeping Ledger temporal KV, native kv_history, Merkle append and cron scheduling blocked.
Build a non-destructive native Ledger kv_history table/index/migration plan from the current reserved __kv_history__ adapter.
Preview deterministic future native kv_history rows expanded from reserved __kv_history__ TemporalKV documents without creating tables, migrating data or writing native rows.
Compare reserved TemporalKV SnapshotRawAt output with native kv_history row previews as a read-only dual-read parity gate before any adapter switch.
Build a non-destructive dual-read/dual-write cutover and rollback plan that consumes the native kv_history plan and migration preview without switching adapters or writing Ledger rows.

Aggregate native plan, migration preview, dual-read parity, adapter, write-path, approval, rollback and audit-proof gates into a read-only cutover readiness report without switching adapters or writing Ledger rows.
Expose the placeholder schema for future per-KV audit proof links before native Ledger kv_history linkage is wired.
Build a read-only KV audit proof-link preview by joining native kv_history row previews with Merkle audit records without backfilling audit_seq/audit_hash or writing Ledger/native rows.
Build a non-destructive KV audit proof-link write-back plan that maps matched preview candidates into future audit_seq/audit_hash backfill actions without writing Ledger/native rows.

Persist a KV audit proof-link write-back handoff record into the pack-local review store without backfilling audit_seq/audit_hash, writing Ledger/native rows, appending Merkle proofs or enqueueing the global Approval Manager.

Build a non-destructive executor handoff plan from the pack-local KV audit proof-link write-back store without consuming approvals, backfilling audit_seq/audit_hash, writing Ledger/native rows or appending Merkle proofs.
Run read-only Merkle audit-chain verification and return recent audit record summaries.
Export a JSON evidence pack for one memory snapshot and nearby history.
